news.headline: ACR Poker raises total prize money to $4 million over 26 events for Supersized Sunday on April 6th.
news.summary: Get ready for an exciting poker event this Sunday in San Jose, Costa Rica on April 3, 2025. ACR Poker is hosting Supersized Sunday with increased prize pools and intense poker action, all happening in just one day. Players can expect bigger winnings and thrilling gameplay during this special event.

news.headline: Ernexa Therapeutics closes new funding round following rebranding, raising undisclosed amount for ovarian cancer program.
news.summary: Following the recent rebranding and adoption of a new strategic direction, the company is making significant progress in advancing its primary program for ovarian cancer treatment. This development comes at a crucial time for the company as it focuses on enhancing its presence in the field of oncology. The advancement of this lead program underscores the company's commitment to addressing the challenges posed by ovarian cancer. The company's efforts have resulted in promising outcomes, with a significant increase in the success rate of treatments. This initiative reflects the company's dedication to innovation and signifies a key milestone in its journey towards improving outcomes for patients.

news.headline: US Commerce Secretary Lutnick: The US team is talking to trading partners today.
US Commerce Secretary Lutnick Bloomberg TV interview ends.
Chan Zuckerberg Biohub NY announces new investigators for immune system research. Nine researchers funded to improve health through immune system projects.
news.summary: Nine researchers have been granted unrestricted funding for projects aimed at utilizing the immune system for disease detection and health monitoring. The Chan Zuckerberg Biohub New York revealed this development on April 3, 2025. This initiative adds nine new investigators to CZ Biohub NY's team.

news.headline: GPUaaS & bare metal cloud enable startups access to essential hardware infrastructure amid AI boom. Tech giants dominate market.
news.summary: In an interview, ionstream CEO Jeff Hinkle discussed how GPU-as-a-Service (GPUaaS) and bare metal cloud services are providing vital infrastructure access for startups and developers amidst tech giants' supply dominance. The AI industry's growth has led to a significant increase in GPU demand. This trend was highlighted during a recent event in Houston on April 2, 2025.

news.headline: Firebird Energy in New Zealand uses clean caffeine and calculated protein to boost energy. No specific numbers mentioned.
news.summary: Firebird Energy in FORT LAUDERDALE, Fla., is utilizing a unique approach to provide energy sustainably. On April 3, 2025, it was reported that the company is focusing on clean sources of caffeine and precise protein measurements to ensure people stay energized. This initiative highlights the dedication to healthy alternatives in the pursuit of energy. By avoiding harmful ingredients and excessive amounts, Firebird Energy aims to keep individuals fueled with high-quality substances. The company's strategy underscores the importance of using  calculation to offer a balanced and effective solution for energy needs.

news.headline: EU's Kallas: It is positive to hear US commitment to NATO from Rubio.
US Commerce Secretary Lutnick: 20% China tariff would drop if Xi offers fentanyl cuts.
Zoomlion inaugurates Phase II of German factory project, advancing sustainable development. Industry leader Zoomlion laid cornerstone on March 31.
news.summary: In WALDLAUBERSHEIM, Germany on April 3, 2025, Zoomlion Heavy Industry Science & Technology Co., Ltd. ("Zoomlion"; 1157.HK), a prominent player in construction machinery, marked the beginning of Phase II of its German factory project on March 31.

news.headline: Ecobat opens 3 lithium recycling plants processing 10,000 tons of batteries annually, with future expansion plans.
news.summary: Ecobat, a prominent player in battery recycling, has recently launched operational facilities in Dallas capable of processing an impressive 10,000 tons of lithium-ion batteries every year. The company has also revealed plans for expanding their lithium operations in the near future. This development signifies a significant advancement in the industry and reflects Ecobat's commitment to sustainable practices.

news.headline: escape.ai forms advisory board to shape Neo Cinema and Creator Economy future in LA. Involves star-studded board.
news.summary: Expertise unparalleled in the industry will drive the advancement of Neo Cinema and Creator Economy. Based in Los Angeles, on April 3, 2025, escape.ai, the pioneer Neo Cinema platform and creator marketplace, revealed its high-caliber advisory board. This move is a significant step in solidifying the company's position as a trailblazer in the industry.

news.headline: Dow Jones drops 1,200 points due to Trump tariffs; Apple, Nvidia, Tesla stocks plummet.
news.summary: Stock market futures on the Dow Jones took a significant hit on Thursday, plummeting by 1,200 points due to President Donald Trump's announcement of tariffs larger than anticipated. This news resulted in notable declines for tech giants such as Apple, Nvidia, and Tesla. The market reaction was swift and strong as these companies saw a sharp decline in their stock prices following the tariff news. This development underscores the impact of policy decisions on market volatility and investor confidence.

news.headline: FDA grants Orphan Drug Designation to RVB-003 by ResVita Bio for Netherton Syndrome - a skin disease.
news.summary: On April 3, 2025, in Berkeley, California, ResVita Bio disclosed that RVB-003, a drug developed for treating Netherton Syndrome, a serious skin condition, has been granted Orphan Drug Designation by the FDA. ResVita Bio is a company specializing in therapeutic solutions for skin diseases. Netherton Syndrome is a chronic ailment that poses life-threatening risks.

news.headline: Homium appoints Marcus Martin as CEO, Mike Chu as President to make homeownership more affordable.
news.summary: In a recent development, Homium has appointed Marcus Martin as the new CEO and Mike Chu as President as part of a strategic move to enhance the company's mission of promoting affordable and accessible homeownership. The transition, effective April 3, 2025, comes as Homium accelerates its efforts in sustainable homeownership financing. This change in leadership aims to drive the company forward in achieving its goal.

news.headline: BP's Cypre Gas Project in Trinidad goes live, contributing to expected peak production of 250,000 boed from 10 projects.
news.summary: BP p.l.c.'s bp Trinidad and Tobago, a partnership between bp and Repsol, has announced the successful commencement of gas production from its Cypre development. The Cypre gas field, located 78 km off the southeast coast of Trinidad in the East Mayaro Block at an 80-meter water depth, is solely owned by bp Trinidad and Tobago. Cypre is one of BP's 10 major projects scheduled for launch between 2025 and 2027, contributing to the anticipated peak net production of 250,000 barrels of oil equivalent per day from these projects. The Cypre project is projected to reach a peak production of approximately 45,000 barrels of oil equivalent per day, equivalent to 250 million standard cubic feet of gas per...

news.headline: Trump's aggressive tariffs cause market turmoil, leading to severe losses: S&P 500 down 3.5%, Nasdaq 100 and Dow Jones also hit. Oil falls 6%.
news.summary: Investor anxiety surged as President Trump unexpectedly announced significant tariffs, causing concerns of inflation. Wall Street veteran Ed Yardeni predicts the US economy could enter a stagflation phase due to these tariffs. The impact was immediate, with S&P 500 futures plummeting 3.5% in premarket trading, along with substantial losses for Nasdaq 100 and Dow Jones. The US Dollar Index, represented by the Invesco DB USD Index Bullish Fund ETF (NYSE:UUP), fell 2%, its largest drop since November 2022. Crude oil futures saw a 6% decline, the sharpest since July 2022. Gold prices also... (Continued on Benzinga.com)

news.headline: February saw a decrease in the U.S. trade deficit as imports affected by tariffs slowed down.
Paragon Space Development Corporation appoints Nina Grigsby as CFO; she will lead the Finance Team.
news.summary: In Tucson, Arizona, on April 3, 2025, Paragon Space Development Corporation® revealed Nina Grigsby as their incoming Chief Financial Officer (CFO). Grigsby will oversee Paragon's Finance Team, reporting directly to the company's President & CEO, Grant Anderson. Ms. Grigsby's appointment brings a fresh perspective to the role, marking an important step in Paragon's leadership structure.

news.headline: Shift5 awarded NAVAIR contract to test predictive maintenance on V-22 Ospreys operated by USMC.
news.summary: In Arlington, Virginia, on April 3, 2025, Shift5, a platform focusing on onboard operational technology (OT) observability, revealed a new agreement with the U.S. Navy. The contract involves the testing of predictive maintenance features on V-22 Ospreys utilized by the U.S. Marine Corps Operational Test Squadron.

news.headline: VOLURINE® uses PACs and D-Mannose for UT health. 25-40% US women 20-40 had UTI, over 6 million patients impacted.
news.summary: SYNEVIT® has launched a groundbreaking supplement to combat UTIs, serving as an effective preventative measure against such infections. UTIs are prevalent among women, with about 25-40% of women aged 20-40 in the US experiencing this condition. This high frequency translates to over 6 million patients in the country alone.

news.headline: Kay Properties & Investments to host Investor Day Conference on April 23, 2025, for 1031 Exchange, DST & 721 UPREIT Investors in Torrance, CA. Event for qualified investors to gain industry knowledge.
news.summary: An upcoming event is tailored for experienced investors seeking detailed insights from professionals on effectively navigating the 1031 exchange, Delaware Statutory Trust, and 721 UPREIT investment sectors. Scheduled for April 3, 2025 in Los Angeles, attendees can expect to enhance their understanding in these areas.

news.headline: 8th Annual Rafi's Amigos Golf Outing on June 6, 2025, in Beavercreek, Ohio, to support STEM education.
news.summary: In Beavercreek, Ohio, on June 6, 2025, the 8th Annual Rafi's Amigos Golf Outing will take place at Beavercreek Golf Club, promising a day of camaraderie and sport. The event is anticipated to attract a significant number of participants as golf clubs swing with purpose to support a charitable cause.

news.headline: Healthcare leadership strategies crucial during rapid evolution; shortages in professionals, policy changes, and tech advancements.
news.summary: On April 3, 2025, in Washington, it was expressed that the healthcare industry is experiencing significant changes, leading to an increased need for innovative leaders. The current scarcity of healthcare workers, along with new policies, governance modifications, and technological progress, underscores the necessity for adept individuals to navigate this evolving landscape. This increased demand for visionary leaders in healthcare is driven by various factors, including the shortage of professionals and advancements in technology.

news.headline: Devonshire Events Company in California, MD, named American Express Neighborhood Champion for 6th year.
news.summary: In California, Maryland on April 3, 2025, Devonshire – An esteemed event planning company – has proudly revealed their sixth consecutive acknowledgment as an American Express Neighborhood Champion. This prestigious recognition underscores their unwavering commitment to excellence in event planning. Devonshire, based in California, MD, continues to establish itself as a leader in the industry.

news.headline: XRP drops 13% in a week, currently at $2.03 with $118.4 billion market cap. Retail demand up, signals potential reversal.
news.summary: XRP, a cryptocurrency, has experienced a 13% decrease in value within a week, with its price at $2.03 and a market cap of $118.4 billion. Despite this decline, retail interest is increasing, and there has been a surge in active addresses reaching new highs, indicating a potential reversal in the medium term. In comparison, Dogecoin (DOGE) is currently priced at $0.1602 with a market cap of $23.8 billion, down by 17.3% in the past week, while Shiba Inu (SHIB) is valued at $0.00001210 with a market cap of $7.1 billion, experiencing a 14.9% decrease. Analyst Ali Martinez suggests that XRP is showing signs of a rebound, notably with the TD Sequential buy signal, hinting at a possible turnaround in the near future.

Stellantis to pause some Canada and Mexico plants due to tariffs.

RobotLAB expands to St. Paul in 2025, introducing robots and automation to local businesses. Led by Dex Chia and Tyler Undem, the new Midwest location aims to provide advanced solutions.
news.summary: St. Paul, Minnesota - In a press release dated April 3, 2025, RobotLAB, a prominent company in robotics integration, revealed the debut of RobotLAB St. Paul, marking its increased presence in the Midwest region. Dex Chia and Tyler Undem will spearhead this expansion, offering customized automation solutions.

news.headline: Georgia author Sue Campbell releases new novel, Conversations in Heaven: A Journey into the Heavenly Realm, explores heaven's mysteries.
news.summary: In Atlanta on April 3, 2025, author Sue Campbell from Georgia excitedly revealed the publication of her long-awaited novel, Conversations in Heaven: A Journey into the Heavenly Realm. The book delves into the mysteries and intricacies of the afterlife. The official launch of the novel...

news.headline: The Heist, a creative company, expands with hires from The Mill; boost in animation, motion, and live-action expertise.
news.summary: On April 3, 2025, in Los Angeles, The Heist, a subsidiary of Thinkingbox recognized for its innovative approach to brand storytelling using animation, motion, and live-action, revealed a major development by adding several key creative and production professionals from The Mill to their team. This expansion marks a significant step in the company's growth strategy.

news.headline: HighCo's shareholding has reached 78%, marking a significant increase in ownership.
1547 & Harrison Street acquire DRFortress, Hawaii's top carrier-neutral data center, expanding digital infrastructure.
news.summary: A recent acquisition has been made by 1547 and Harrison Street, with them acquiring DRFortress, which is considered to be Hawaii’s largest carrier-neutral data center. This move signifies an expansion in digital infrastructure presence across the Pacific region.

news.headline: China Finance Ministry: Downgrade of China's sovereign credit rating is biased and cannot fully and objectively reflect the actual situation in china, deeply regrets it.
FleetFidelity launched by Yahara Software in Madison to help transportation firms with safety, cost reduction, and efficiency.
news.summary: In Madison, Wisconsin on April 3, 2025, FleetFidelity was introduced by Yahara Software as a cutting-edge fleet performance platform. This technology aims to assist transportation companies in enhancing safety, cutting costs, and streamlining operations. The platform received insights from experienced fleet professionals to ensure its efficacy.

news.headline: Blue Falcons Investigation in Hope Mills, N.C., expanding efforts to assist parents in custody battles, facing emotional, financial, and legal challenges.
news.summary: In Hope Mills, North Carolina, on April 3, 2025, a company known as Blue Falcons Investigation acknowledges the difficulties that custody battles present for parents. These battles are emotionally and financially taxing, with various legal obstacles. Blue Falcons Investigation is dedicated to assisting in such situations, recognizing the challenges faced by parents.

news.headline: Firebird Energy, protein coffee drink from New Zealand, to launch in US after harrowing journey.
news.summary: Fort Lauderdale, FL - On April 3, 2025, Firebird Energy, the groundbreaking protein coffee beverage originating from New Zealand, is set to launch in the United States. This innovative energy drink emerged as a result of overcoming adversity and hardship, embodying resilience and triumph. Known for its unique blend of protein and coffee, Firebird Energy is poised to make its mark in the US market.

news.headline: China: The downgrade does not fully reflect economic recovery momentum.
Turvo and SMC3 partner with Gebrüder Weiss to optimize LTL freight management solutions in a strategic alliance.
news.summary: Key players in the industry have joined forces to offer integrated freight management solutions, leveraging the expertise of global logistics firm Gebrüder Weiss. Recently, Turvo, LLC, a prominent provider of a top-tier collaboration platform catering to the supply chain sector, announced this strategic partnership. This initiative aims to streamline operations and enhance customer experiences. The collaboration is set to revolutionize freight management, with Gebrüder Weiss providing valuable customer insights to drive innovation. This partnership is expected to yield significant improvements in efficiency and service quality across the industry.

news.headline: eXtremeRate to offer customization solutions for Nintendo Switch 2. Launch imminent. Leading in tailored gaming products.
news.summary: eXtremeRate, the renowned global leader in gaming console and controller customization, is gearing up for the release of Nintendo's highly anticipated Switch 2 in Shenzhen, China. Scheduled for launch on April 3, 2025, the company is set to offer a range of unique customization options for the new console. As Nintendo's latest offering is set to hit the market, eXtremeRate aims to provide personalized enhancements to make each gaming experience one-of-a-kind. Stay tuned for the latest updates on how eXtremeRate plans to revolutionize the gaming experience with the upcoming Switch 2 release.

news.headline: OsteoStrong expands with new location in Melbourne, FL, bringing science-backed skeletal strengthening technology to the Southeast.
news.summary: OsteoStrong, a renowned provider of science-supported skeletal strengthening solutions, is launching a new facility in Southeast Melbourne, Florida. This expansion, set to commence on April 3, 2025, underlines the company's commitment to promoting skeletal health in the region. Residents of Melbourne will now have access to advanced, non-pharmacological methods aimed at enhancing their skeletal strength. This initiative marks a significant step in OsteoStrong's mission to address bone health concerns, with an emphasis on innovation and evidence-based practices.

news.headline: Holistic health on the rise as mainstream movement. Suppliers need to plan ahead to meet growing market demands.
news.summary: Rapid growth in the health and wellness market is transforming the way society views holistic health, shifting it from a niche idea to a mainstream movement. Suppliers in this industry need to prepare in advance to meet the increasing demand. Recent data shows that the market is expanding significantly, with statistics revealing a substantial increase in consumer interest and spending in this sector. This trend is particularly notable in Fort Lauderdale, Florida, as of April 3, 2025. It is crucial for businesses to recognize this shift in consumer behavior and adapt their strategies to cater to this evolving landscape.

news.headline: Sewa International USA responds to 7.7 magnitude earthquake in Southeast Asia with relief efforts.
news.summary: Sewa International USA has initiated rapid relief efforts in response to a devastating 7.7 magnitude earthquake and a subsequent 6.4 magnitude aftershock that hit Southeast Asia on March 28, 2025. The organization, known for its global humanitarian work, is actively involved in providing aid to the affected regions.

news.headline: ATS introduces work order integration feature for R360 Machine Health Monitoring service to enhance efficiency.
news.summary: In Peoria, Illinois, on April 3, 2025, Advanced Technology Services, Inc. (ATS) introduced a work order integration feature for its Reliability 360® (R360®) Machine Health Monitoring service. Through this API-based integration, ATS's R360® platform now offers enhanced functionality for streamlining maintenance processes, improving operational efficiency, and boosting performance. This innovation marks a significant milestone for ATS as they strive to revolutionize machine health monitoring in the industrial sector.

news.headline: Morgan Stanley now expects no interest rate cut from the US Fed in 2025 vs prior forecast of one 25 bps cut in June.
WH Press Sec. Leavitt: Trump is focused on lowering costs while raising tariffs.
